monitor_the_situation.title: US Strikes Iran, Kuwait Intercepts Missiles; Tehran Threatens Energy Exports
— S4 · Conflict · Gaza Strip, Palestine · 9h ago. The Palestinian Health Ministry reports the death toll from Israel's military campaign in Gaza has risen to 73,246, with thousands more wounded.
US Resumes Naval Blockade of Iran, Strikes Military Targets Near Hormuz
Iran Strikes US Bases in Bahrain, Jordan, and Kuwait With Missiles and Drones
US Strikes Oil Tanker Near Strait of Hormuz
— S3 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 17m ago. US Central Command confirmed strikes targeting Iranian military capabilities, disabling an empty oil tanker near the Strait of Hormuz.
